'''Bok''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] who commanded the ''[[Grey Damsel]]'' as its [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Bok's [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was present at the [[attack on Tak Base]] during the [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark trooper]] demonstration assault, and temporarily escaped the following devastation. [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Toka]] instructed Bok to take the ''Grey Damsel'' to warn allies of the new dark trooper threat. Bok ordered his crew to make a jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], before he realized that a dark trooper had snuck aboard. Bok and his entire crew were killed, and the ship crash-landed on the surface of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|4|Sand Blasted}} {{1st}}
